title: DNTR-seq
author: Vasilios Zachariadis
materials: Following step 4, cytosolic/RNA fraction plate contains 2µl solution per well. Primer annealing Thaw plate. Spin down. Incubate in thermocycler at 72 °C for 00:03:00 . Remove to ice immediately.
Read in plate reader using 485nM excitation/528nm emission

steps.title: Prepare lysis buffer mix NOTE
steps.instruction: Prepare lysis buffer mix NOTE: Reagents are prepared on ice, working quickly. ERCC is stored in single-use aliquots at -80 °C , thawed on ice and added last. A B C D 1 Reagent Reaction conc. µL per reaction 384w plate (400x) 2 Nuclease free H2O - 1.965 786 3 RNase Inhibitor (40u/µL) 1 unit/µL 0.075 30 4 ERCC (1:1 200 000) - 0.075 30 5 Triton-X100 (10% solution) 0.2% 0.06 24 6 dNTP (10mM each) 2.5mM/each 0.75 300 7 Oligo-dT (100µM) 2.5µM 0.075 30 8 9 To dispense 3 1200 rxn13115228848006000H2O1,313,931509,12377,2862887860RNase Inhibitor0,050,1557,614,4240300ERCC (1:1 200 000)0,050,1557,614,424030010% Triton0,040,1246,0811,5219224010mM dNTP0,51,557614424003000100uM 5'Biot-dT0,050,1557,614,4240300 Total262304576960012000 Add 3 µL, lysis buffer mix to each well. Cover with appropriate lids. Spin down. Snap freeze on dry ice. Store until use at -80 °C

steps.title: Sort single cells into 3 µL,...
steps.instruction: Sort single cells into 3 µL, lysis buffer mix Immediately seal with appropriate seals (approved for -80C > 100C) and centrifuge at 2000 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes Snap freeze on dry ice . Store until use at -80 °C

steps.title: Thaw plate on ice
steps.instruction: Thaw plate on ice. Centrifuge at 500 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes . Keep on ice.

steps.title: Transfer 2 µL from each well...
steps.instruction: Transfer 2 µL from each well of the sorted plate into an empty 384-well plate. Use a low flow rate ( 2mm/s ) and an aspiration height of 0.9mm above the bottom. NOTE: We use the Eppendorf EpMotion 5073m benchtop liquid handler. We have succesfully used other solutions, including the Hamilton STARlet, a semi-manual Gilson Platemaster 96-well pipette, and even manual 8-channel pipettes.

steps.title: Spin down and freeze nuclear fraction...
steps.instruction: Spin down and freeze nuclear fraction at -20 °C to aid complete lysis. If proceeding with cDNA protocol --> step 12. If proceeding with DNA protocol (step 6): spin down and snap freeze cytosolic fraction on dry ice and store at -80 °C NOTE: We will typically proceed with cDNA synthesis, unless experimental design dictates otherwise, to avoid an additional freeze-thaw cycle for mRNAs in the cytosolic fraction.

steps.title: Dilute Proteinase K (stock 20mg/ml) to 0
steps.instruction: Dilute Proteinase K (stock 20mg/ml) to 0.2mg/ml by 30mM Tris-HCl pH8.0

steps.title: Add 2 µL diluted Proteinase K (0
steps.instruction: Add 2 µL diluted Proteinase K (0.2mg/ml) to each well. Makes 0.13mg/ml reaction concentration.

steps.title: Incubate in thermocycler at
steps.instruction: Incubate in thermocycler at: - 50 °C 01:00:00 - 80 °C 00:30:00 - 4 °C, hold

steps.title: Tn5 digestion Tn5 is produced from...
steps.instruction: Tn5 digestion Tn5 is produced from psfTn5 (Addgene #79107), purified to ~3mg/ml and assembled with Illumina Tn5 adapters (see oligos ) as in Picelli et al, 2014. Tn5 transposase and tagmentation procedures for massively scaled sequencing projects.. Genome research.

steps.title: Prepare 2X Tn5 Buffer
steps.instruction: Prepare 2X Tn5 Buffer. Keep assembled Tn5 enzyme (Picelli et al, 2014) on ice block and add last. A B C D 1 Reagent Reaction conc µL per reaction 384w plate (420x) 2 5X TAPS-PEG(50mM TAPS,25mM MgCl2,40% PEG-8000) 10mM TAPS5mM MgCl28% PEG-8000 1.6 672 3 psfTn5, loaded with 50µM MEDS-A/B 0.1 42 4 Nuclease free H2O 3.3 1386 5 6 To dispense 5 2100 12204205X TAPS-PEG 1.6352672Buffer is 50mM TAPS, 25mM MgCl2, 40% PEG 8k. Final concentration is 8% PEG, 5mM MgCl2, 10mM TAPS.psfTn5, loaded with 50µM MEDS-A/B0.12242Conc equivalent to 0.1µl in 8µl reaction. Keep in iceblock, add lastH2O3.37261386Volume511002100 Add 5 µL per well. Vortex and spin down plate. NOTE: Buffer contains PEG, which is viscous. 5X TAPS-PEG buffer should be allowed to assume room temperature before dispensing to allow proper mixing.

steps.title: Incubate in thermocycler
steps.instruction: Incubate in thermocycler: 55 °C 00:10:00 Remove immediately and stop reaction by adding 2 µL, per well of 0.2% SDS. Vortex, spin down and incubate 00:10:00 at 55 °C

steps.title: Prepare PCR master-mix A B C...
steps.instruction: Prepare PCR master-mix A B C D 1 Reagent Reaction conc. µl per reaction 384w plate 2 Nuclease free H2O - 2.9 1218 3 KAPA HiFi Buffer (5X) 1X 3.9 1638 4 dNTP (10mM/each) 0.3mM/each 0.6 252 5 KAPA enzyme (1u/µl) 0.02u/µl 0.4 168 6 Tween-20 (10%) 0.1% 0.2 84 7 8 To dispense 8 3360 9 1220H2O3.27045x buffer4880dNTP0.6132KAPA0.488Tween-20, 10%0.244To dispense8.41848

steps.title: Add primers/barcodes 1
steps.instruction: Add primers/barcodes 1.5 µL, per well (from 384-well index plates, with 3.75µM/each forward/reverse primers; see oligos ). Total reaction volume is now 19.5µl (10µl sample + 9.5µl PCR mix and primers).

steps.title: Vortex plate, spin down and incubate...
steps.instruction: Vortex plate, spin down and incubate in thermocycler with the following program: %s %s 72C, 3 min95C, 30s18 cycles of95C, 15s67C, 30s72C, 45s72C 4 min4C, hold

steps.title: Pool 3 µL, from each well into a 1
steps.instruction: Pool 3 µL, from each well into a 1.5mL Eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.9X SPRI-beads in 20% PEG solution. Incubate for 00:05:00 Room temperature

steps.title: Place on magnetic rack 00:03:00
steps.instruction: Place on magnetic rack 00:03:00

steps.title: Remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant

steps.title: Add 1 volume 80% EtOH (fresh)
steps.instruction: Add 1 volume 80% EtOH (fresh). Incubate for 00:00:30

steps.title: Remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant

steps.title: Repeat EtOH wash
steps.instruction: Repeat EtOH wash

steps.title: Re-suspend beads thoroughly in 100 µL, EB or TE buffer
steps.instruction: Re-suspend beads thoroughly in 100 µL, EB or TE buffer

steps.title: Repeat cleanup (from step 1-
steps.instruction: Repeat cleanup (from step 1-

steps.title: and elute in 30 µL, EB or TE buffer
steps.instruction: and elute in 30 µL, EB or TE buffer

steps.title: (optional) Quality control of DNA libraries...
steps.instruction: (optional) Quality control of DNA libraries Using Agilent HS 5000 DNA chips (or equivalent) Pooled (and dliuted) DNA-library from 384-well plate. This library was sequenced on a NextSeq 550 loading 2.5pM based on a peak of 334bp. Sequencing was paired-end 37bp, 8bp dual index.

steps.title: Prepare RT master-mix A B C...
steps.instruction: Prepare RT master-mix A B C D 1 Reagent Reaction conc. µl per reaction 384w plate (420x) 2 3 Maxima H Minus RT (200/µl) 2u/µl 0.05 21 4 RNase Inhibitor (40u/µl) 1.66u/µl 0.125 52.5 5 5X First Strand buffer 1X 1 420 6 DTT (100mM) 8.33mM 0.25 105 7 Betaine (5M) 1.66M 1 420 8 MgCl2 (1M) 10mM 0.03 12.6 9 TSO (100uM) 1.66µM 0.05 21 10 Nuclease free H2O - 0.495 207.9 11 12 Total 3 1260 1840Cell Lysis Volume2SmartScribe0.475399RNase Inhibitor0.1251055x First Strand buffer1840DTT (100mM)0.25210Betaine (5M) [fridge]1840MgCl2 (1M) [bench]0.0325.2TSO (100uM)0.0542H200.0758.8Total32520 Dispense 3 µL, per well . Total reaction volume will be 5µl. Cover plate with new film and spin down.

steps.title: Incubate in thermocycler 42 °C 01:30:00...
steps.instruction: Incubate in thermocycler 42 °C 01:30:00 70 °C 00:05:00 4 °C, hold

steps.title: cDNA preamplification A B C D 1 Reaction conc
steps.instruction: cDNA preamplification A B C D 1 Reaction conc. µl per reaction 384w plate (420x) 2 Nuclease free H2O - 0.82 345 3 Kapa HiFi HotStart ReadyMix (2X) 1X 6 2520 4 IS_PCR primer (10µM) 0.1µM 0.12 50.4 5 Lambda Exonuclease (10u/µl) 0.05 units 0.06 25.2 6 7 Total 7 2940 8 Reactions1420RT reaction52100H2O1.0688448.875Kapa HiFi HotStart ReadyMix (2x)6.252625IS_PCR primer (10uM)0.12552.5Lambda Exonuclease0.0562523.625Total7.50003150 Dispense 7 µL, per well . Total reaction volume will be 12µl.

steps.title: Vortex, spin down
steps.instruction: Vortex, spin down. Cover with new lid. Incubate in thermocycler with the following program: A B C D 1 Step Temperature Time Cycles 2 Lambda exonuclease 37ºC 30 min 1x 3 Initial denaturation 95ºC 3 min 1x 4 Denaturation 98ºC 20 sec 18-24x 5 Annealing 67ºC 15 sec 6 Elongation 72ºC 4 min 7 Final elongation 72ºC 5 min 8 4C Hold 37C for 30min;95C for 3min;21 cycles of:98C for 20s67C for 15s72C for 4min72C for 5min4C hold NOTE: The number of cycles of pre-amplification will be different for different cell types. We suggest running a pilot (ideally qPCR-monitored to determine inflection point, for example by using 1X dsGreen to the reaction above)

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.7X volume of SPRI beads per well. Mix well by pipetting

steps.title: Incubate 00:05:00 Room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate 00:05:00 Room temperature

steps.title: Place on magnetic stand for 00:03:00
steps.instruction: Place on magnetic stand for 00:03:00

steps.title: Add 40 µL 80% EtOH and incubate 00:00:30
steps.instruction: Add 40 µL 80% EtOH and incubate 00:00:30

steps.title: Remove EtOH (without disturbing the beads)
steps.instruction: Remove EtOH (without disturbing the beads)

steps.title: Wash again with EtOH
steps.instruction: Wash again with EtOH. Make sure to remove well.

steps.title: Allow beads to air-dry for 00:05:00 - 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Allow beads to air-dry for 00:05:00 - 00:10:00 . Take care not to over-dry the beads.

steps.title: Remove plate from magnetic stand
steps.instruction: Remove plate from magnetic stand

steps.title: Elute beads in 12 µL, EB...
steps.instruction: Elute beads in 12 µL, EB or TE buffer Mix well by pipetting

steps.title: Incubate 00:05:00 Room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate 00:05:00 Room temperature

steps.title: Place on magnetic plate for 00:03:00
steps.instruction: Place on magnetic plate for 00:03:00

steps.title: Optional
steps.instruction: Optional: Carefully remove supernatant to the elution plate. cDNA plates can also be stored at -20C with beads.

steps.title: Measure concentration of random wells using...
steps.instruction: Measure concentration of random wells using Qubit HS dsDNA, adapted to a 96-well plate reader.

steps.title: Add 98
steps.instruction: Add 98.5 µL of 1X Qubit HS dsDNA solution (or mix dye and buffer separately) to a flat-bottom, black plate

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.5 µL of cDNA sample

steps.title: Add Standards (NOTE
steps.instruction: Add Standards (NOTE: We make a 8-step ladder from 0ng/µl --> 10ng/µl Qubit Standard DNA in TE buffer)

steps.title: Calculate cDNA concentration from linear model of Standards ladder Option
steps.instruction: Calculate cDNA concentration from linear model of Standards ladder Option

steps.title: Measure full plate using Qubit HS...
steps.instruction: Measure full plate using Qubit HS dsDNA in black, flat-bottom 384-well plate

steps.title: Add 20 µL, 1X Qubit HS dsDNA solution
steps.instruction: Add 20 µL, 1X Qubit HS dsDNA solution

steps.title: Add 1 µL, cDNA sample 3-5 as above
steps.instruction: Add 1 µL, cDNA sample 3-5 as above

steps.title: (optional) cDNA quality control Using Agilent...
steps.instruction: (optional) cDNA quality control Using Agilent HS 5000 DNA chips (or equivalent) Example of a single immune (=small) cell cDNA profile (cytosolic fraction from DNTR protocol)

steps.title: Make cDNA dilution plate Dilute cDNA...
steps.instruction: Make cDNA dilution plate Dilute cDNA based on average concentration from Qubit measurements. Target concentration 150 pg, per µl in 15 µL (optionally in same plate) Optional: if using a 384w-plate reader, one can normalize each well to 150pg/µl with variable water addition.

steps.title: Prepare Tn5 master mix Let TAPS-PEG...
steps.instruction: Prepare Tn5 master mix Let TAPS-PEG equilibrate at 37ºC and mix well before use. A B C D 1 Reagent Reaction conc. µl per reaction 384w plate (420x) 2 Nuclease free H2O - 0.750 315 3 TAPS-PEG(50mM TAPS,25mM MgCl2,40% PEG-8000) 10mM TAPS5mM MgCl28% PEG-8000 0.500 210 4 psfTn5, loaded with 50µM MEDS-A/B 0.250 105 5 6 Total 1.5 630 7 1500H2O1.050525TAPS-PEG0.500250tn5 stock0.250125 Total1.800900 Dispense 1.5 µL, per well in a new plate ( tagmentation plate )

steps.title: Add 1 µL cDNA (normalized to...
steps.instruction: Add 1 µL cDNA (normalized to 150pg/µl ) Mix well by vortexing plate. Cover with new lid and spin down.

steps.title: Incubate in thermocycler at 55 °C...
steps.instruction: Incubate in thermocycler at 55 °C 00:10:00 Remove immediately and stop reaction by adding 1 µL, per well of 0.1% SDS. Vortex, spin down and incubate 00:10:00 at 55 °C

steps.title: Make PCR master-mix A B C...
steps.instruction: Make PCR master-mix A B C D 1 Reagent Reaction conc. µl per reaction 384w plate (420x) 2 H2O - 4.85 2037 3 KAPA HiFi Buffer (5X) 1X 2.5 1050 4 dNTP (10mM/each) 0.3mM/each 0.3 126 5 KAPA enzyme (1u/µl) 0.02u/µl 0.2 84 6 Tween-20 (10%) 0.12% 0.15 63 7 8 Total 8 9 1420H2O13.2555655x buffer52100dNTPs0.75315KAPA0.5210Dispense19.50 Dispense 8 µL, per well to tagmentation plate (containing 3.5µl sample after step 23)

steps.title: Add primers/barcodes 1 µL, per well...
steps.instruction: Add primers/barcodes 1 µL, per well (from 384-well index plates, with 3.75µM/each forward/reverse primers; see oligos ; final primer concentration 0.3µM per primer and reaction). Total reaction volume is 12.5µl (3.5µl sample + 9µl PCR mix and primers).

steps.title: Vortex
steps.instruction: Vortex. Spin down and cover. Incubate in thermocycler as below: %s %s 72C, 3 min95C, 30s18 cycles of95C, 15s67C, 30s72C, 45s72C 4 min4C, hold

steps.title: Pool 2
steps.instruction: Pool 2.5 µL from each well to an 1.5ml Eppendorf tube

steps.instruction: Add 1 volume 80% EtOH (fresh). Incubate for 00:00:30

steps.title: Remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant

steps.instruction: Repeat EtOH wash
